use_codes.desc: USE IN SONOHYSTEROSALPINOGRAPHY TO ASSESS FALLOPIAN TUBE PATENCY

indications.text:
ExEm® Foam is indicated for sonohysterosalpingography to assess fallopian tube patency in women with
known or suspected infertility.
